signal: Hungary election crisis deepens with BBC voter intimidation expose and confirmed Russian political technologists in Budapest; NATO reports 20% European defence spending increase; Slovenia election produces razor-thin result amid Israeli Black Cube interference.

delta_strip.title: Hungary: Mass voter intimidation + Russian SDA confirmed in Budapest
delta_strip.one_line: BBC documentary alleges Fidesz intimidation in 53/106 districts; Russian political technologists operating under Kiriyenko.

delta_strip.title: NATO: European defence spending up 20% in real terms
delta_strip.one_line: All allies at 2% GDP for first time; total >$1.4T; SAFE EUR 150B operationalising.

delta_strip.title: Slovenia: Black Cube interference confirmed in razor-thin election
delta_strip.one_line: Israeli Black Cube confirmed 4 visits, met Jansa; GS 28.5% vs SDS 28.1%.

delta_strip.title: Czech Republic joins HU/SK anti-Ukraine bloc under Babis
delta_strip.one_line: Babis government rejected Ukraine financial aid, joining Orbán and Fico in opposing EU backing.

delta_strip.title: CPAC Budapest + Patriots Grand Assembly — 51 countries converge
delta_strip.one_line: 45 speakers incl. Trump video, Netanyahu endorsement, Georgian PM; confirms MAGA-EU far-right institutional alliance.

signal: Russian spring offensive stalling as internal critics admit Ukrainian counterattacks 'rather successful'; Kremlin halts gasoline exports; Zelensky proposes Easter ceasefire — dismissed by Moscow. Hungary election enters final 12 days. SAFE second wave €17.1B for France and Czechia.

delta_strip.title: Russian offensive stalling — milbloggers and Duma admit failure
delta_strip.one_line: ISW Mar 30: Russian forces 'unable to reverse unfavorable situation'; Duma questions 2026 objectives.

delta_strip.title: Russia halts gasoline exports Apr-Jul — Ukrainian strikes forcing domestic crisis
delta_strip.one_line: Novak directive confirms 4-month export ban; 40% oil export capacity loss from Ukrainian strikes.

delta_strip.title: SAFE second wave: €17.1B for France and Czechia
delta_strip.one_line: Commission proposal brings SAFE total proposed to ~€55B across 10 member states.

delta_strip.title: Czech Pardubice: intelligence probes Russian false-flag scenario
delta_strip.one_line: NCTEKK investigating whether 'Earthquake Faction' is foreign intelligence front; 7 suspects sought.

delta_strip.title: Hungary election 12 days out — Tisza lead widening in aggregate polls
delta_strip.one_line: PolitPro aggregate: Tisza 47.8% vs Fidesz 40.5%; Vance visit 'early April'; €90B loan blocked.

signal: EU Council adopts comprehensive hybrid threat deterrence conclusions as Russia's grey-zone operational tempo accelerates: 40 arson plots in Germany and Poland (attacks quadrupled 2023-2024), sustained airspace incursions, ECFR advocates 'shield to sword' offensive doctrine shift. Hungary election 4 days out with active RU/US/IL triple interference convergence.

delta_strip.title: EU Council adopts hybrid threat deterrence conclusions — most significant institutional escalation since Strategic Compass
delta_strip.one_line: Council formally condemns Russia-linked sabotage, cyber, FIMI, election interference; commits to hybrid toolbox, NIS2, cyber diplomacy as coordinated response.

delta_strip.title: 40 Russia-linked arson plots in Germany and Poland — attacks quadrupled 2023-2024
delta_strip.one_line: Robert Schuman Foundation study documents nearly quadrupled Russian hybrid attacks across Europe; Warsaw shopping centre destruction included.

delta_strip.title: ECFR 'From Shield to Sword' — offensive hybrid strategy advocacy signals doctrine evolution
delta_strip.one_line: ECFR urges proactive cost-imposition across information, cyber, finance, kinetic domains; EU/NATO posture shift from resilience to deterrence framing.

delta_strip.title: Russian drone and jet airspace incursions — sustained escalation documented
delta_strip.one_line: DGAP documents steep rise in airspace violations since 2022; EU Council conclusions now address air domain hybrid threats including GNSS jamming.

delta_strip.title: Hungary election 4 days out — RU/US/IL triple interference active
delta_strip.one_line: PolitPro aggregate: Tisza 47.8% vs Fidesz 40.5%; SDA, Alliance of Sovereign Nations, Hasbara all active; €90B Ukraine loan block in play.

signal: EU Council adopts conclusions to counter Russia-linked hybrid threats including sabotage and FIMI.

delta_strip.title: No material developments
delta_strip.one_line: EU Council adopts conclusions to counter Russia-linked hybrid threats including sabotage and FIMI.
